Properties.Functions: "void HandleQuestItemDrop(<nl>    string questContainerName,<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var questContainer = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(questContainerName);<nl><nl>        // Count current items in quest container<nl>        var itemCounts = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) itemCounts[req.itemName] = 0;<nl><nl>        foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>            if (item.count > 0 && reverseItemMap.ContainsKey(item.id)) {<nl>                string name = reverseItemMap[item.id];<nl>                if (itemCounts.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>                    itemCounts[name] += item.count;<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        bool allMet = true;<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) {<nl>            int has = itemCounts.ContainsKey(req.itemName) ? itemCounts[req.itemName] : 0;<nl>            if (has < req.amount) allMet = false;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        if (allMet) {<nl>            RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(questContainer, requiredItems);<nl>            Request_Complete = 1;<nl>        } else {<nl>            Request_Complete = 0;<nl>        }<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>void RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(IContainer questContainer, List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems) {<nl>    var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>    var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>    foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>    var amountsToRemove = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>    foreach (var item in requiredItems) amountsToRemove[item.itemName] = item.amount;<nl><nl>    foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>        if (item.count <= 0) continue;<nl><nl>        if (reverseItemMap.TryGetValue(item.id, out string name) && amountsToRemove.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>            int toRemove = Math.Min(item.count, amountsToRemove[name]);<nl>            questContainer.RemoveItems(item.id, toRemove);<nl>            amountsToRemove[name] -= toRemove;<nl>            if (amountsToRemove[name] <= 0) amountsToRemove.Remove(name);<nl><nl>            if (amountsToRemove.Count == 0) break;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}"

"void HandleQuestItemDrop(<nl>    string questContainerName,<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var questContainer = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(questContainerName);<nl><nl>        // Count current items in quest container<nl>        var itemCounts = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) itemCounts[req.itemName] = 0;<nl><nl>        foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>            if (item.count > 0 && reverseItemMap.ContainsKey(item.id)) {<nl>                string name = reverseItemMap[item.id];<nl>                if (itemCounts.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>                    itemCounts[name] += item.count;<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        bool allMet = true;<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) {<nl>            int has = itemCounts.ContainsKey(req.itemName) ? itemCounts[req.itemName] : 0;<nl>            if (has < req.amount) allMet = false;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        if (allMet) {<nl>            RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(questContainer, requiredItems);<nl>            Request_Complete = 1;<nl>        } else {<nl>            Request_Complete = 0;<nl>        }<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>void RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(IContainer questContainer, List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems) {<nl>    var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>    var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>    foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>    var amountsToRemove = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>    foreach (var item in requiredItems) amountsToRemove[item.itemName] = item.amount;<nl><nl>    foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>        if (item.count <= 0) continue;<nl><nl>        if (reverseItemMap.TryGetValue(item.id, out string name) && amountsToRemove.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>            int toRemove = Math.Min(item.count, amountsToRemove[name]);<nl>            questContainer.RemoveItems(item.id, toRemove);<nl>            amountsToRemove[name] -= toRemove;<nl>            if (amountsToRemove[name] <= 0) amountsToRemove.Remove(name);<nl><nl>            if (amountsToRemove.Count == 0) break;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}"

itemCounts[req.itemName] : 0;<nl>            if (has < req.amount) allMet = false;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        if (allMet) {<nl>            RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(questContainer, requiredItems);<nl>            Request_Complete = 1;<nl>        } else {<nl>            Request_Complete = 0;<nl>        }<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>void RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(IContainer questContainer, List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems) {<nl>    var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>    var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>    foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>    var amountsToRemove = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>    foreach (var item in requiredItems) amountsToRemove[item.itemName] = item.amount;<nl><nl>    foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>        if (item.count <= 0) continue;<nl><nl>        if (reverseItemMap.TryGetValue(item.id, out string name) && amountsToRemove.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>            int toRemove = Math.Min(item.count, amountsToRemove[name]);<nl>            questContainer.RemoveItems(item.id, toRemove);<nl>            amountsToRemove[name] -= toRemove;<nl>            if (amountsToRemove[name] <= 0) amountsToRemove.Remove(name);<nl><nl>            if (amountsToRemove.Count == 0) break;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}"

"void HandleQuestItemDrop(<nl>    string questContainerName,<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var questContainer = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(questContainerName);<nl><nl>        // Count current items in quest container<nl>        var itemCounts = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) itemCounts[req.itemName] = 0;<nl><nl>        foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>            if (item.count > 0 && reverseItemMap.ContainsKey(item.id)) {<nl>                string name = reverseItemMap[item.id];<nl>                if (itemCounts.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>                    itemCounts[name] += item.count;<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        bool allMet = true;<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) {<nl>            int has = itemCounts.ContainsKey(req.itemName) ? "// Helper method to convert bb code to nice lcd colors<nl>string ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(string input) {<nl>    string result = input;<nl><nl>    // First, handle [c][color]Text[-][/c] and [c][color]Text<nl>    while (result.Contains('[c]')) {<nl>        int startIndex = result.IndexOf('[c]') + 3;<nl>        int endIndex = result.Contains('[/c]') ? result.IndexOf('[/c]', startIndex) : result.Length;<nl><nl>        if (startIndex == -1 || endIndex == -1) break;<nl><nl>        string bbCodeContent = result.Substring(startIndex, endIndex - startIndex);<nl><nl>        int colorStart = bbCodeContent.IndexOf('[') + 1;<nl>        int colorEnd = bbCodeContent.IndexOf(']', colorStart);<nl><nl>        if (colorStart == -1 || colorEnd == -1) break;<nl><nl>        string colorCode = bbCodeContent.Substring(colorStart, colorEnd - colorStart);<nl>        string textContent = bbCodeContent.Substring(colorEnd + 1);<nl><nl>        if (textContent.Contains('[-]')) {<nl>            textContent = textContent.Replace('[-]', '');<nl>        }<nl><nl>        string htmlContent = $'<color=#{colorCode}>{textContent}</color>';<nl><nl>        result = result.Replace('[c]' + bbCodeContent + (endIndex < result.Length ? '[/c]' : ''), htmlContent);<nl>    }<nl><nl>    // Now, handle ultra-short [color]Text<nl>    // Look for patterns like [ff0000]My Text or [ff0000a0]My Text<nl>    int searchIndex = 0;<nl>    while (searchIndex < result.Length) {<nl>        int colorOpen = result.IndexOf('[', searchIndex);<nl>        if (colorOpen == -1) break;<nl><nl>        int colorClose = result.IndexOf(']', colorOpen);<nl>        if (colorClose == -1 || colorClose - colorOpen < 7) {<nl>            // The color code should have at least 7 characters (e.g., [ff0000] or [ff0000a0])<nl>            searchIndex = colorOpen + 1;<nl>            continue;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        string colorCode = result.Substring(colorOpen + 1, 6);<nl>        string alphaCode = colorClose - colorOpen == 9 ? result.Substring(colorOpen + 7, 2) : 'ff'; // Default alpha to full (ff) if not provided<nl><nl>        // After color code, text starts<nl>        int textStart = colorClose + 1;<nl>        if (textStart >= result.Length) break;<nl><nl>        // Find where the color ends (next BBCode or end of string)<nl>        int nextTag = result.IndexOf('[', textStart);<nl>        int textEnd = nextTag != -1 ? nextTag : result.Length;<nl><nl>        string textContent = result.Substring(textStart, textEnd - textStart);<nl><nl>        string originalBBCode = result.Substring(colorOpen, textEnd - colorOpen);<nl>        string htmlContent = $'<color=#{colorCode}{alphaCode}>{textContent}</color>';<nl><nl>        result = result.Replace(originalBBCode, htmlContent);<nl><nl>        // Move forward<nl>        searchIndex = colorOpen + htmlContent.Length;<nl>    }<nl><nl>    return result;<nl>}<nl><nl>// Helper method to create reward items with optional meta<nl>(string itemName, int amount, int? meta) CreateReward(string itemName, int amount, int? meta = null) {<nl>    return (itemName, amount, meta);<nl>}<nl><nl>void HandleQuestItemDrop(<nl>    string questContainerName,<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems,<nl>    string lcdLogName,<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount, int? meta)> rewards,<nl>    bool rewardInContainer = false,<nl>    string rewardContainerName = null<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var lcdLog = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<ILcd>(lcdLogName);<nl>        var questContainer = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(questContainerName);<nl>        var rewardContainer = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(rewardContainerName) ? LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(rewardContainerName) : null;<nl><nl>        // Count current items in quest container<nl>        var itemCounts = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) itemCounts[req.itemName] = 0;<nl><nl>        foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>            if (item.count > 0 && reverseItemMap.ContainsKey(item.id)) {<nl>                string name = reverseItemMap[item.id];<nl>                if (itemCounts.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>                    itemCounts[name] += item.count;<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        string output = 'Quest Requirements:
';<nl>        bool allMet = true;<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) {<nl>            int has = itemCounts.ContainsKey(req.itemName) ? itemCounts[req.itemName] : 0;<nl>            output += $'{req.itemName}: {has} / {req.amount}
';<nl>            if (has < req.amount) allMet = false;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        if (allMet) {<nl>            output += '<color=#019245>All items delivered! Quest Completed!</color>
';<nl><nl>            var rewardsGiven = new List<string>();<nl>            foreach (var reward in rewards) {<nl>                if (reward.meta.HasValue && rewardInContainer) {<nl>                    output += '<color=#ff0000>Meta items cannot be placed in containers!</color>
';<nl>                } else {<nl>                    var rewardInfo = RewardPlayer(reward.itemName, reward.amount, reward.meta, rewardContainer, rewardInContainer);<nl>                    rewardsGiven.Add(rewardInfo);<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl><nl>            output += 'Rewards:
';<nl>            foreach (var r in rewardsGiven) output += '- ' + r + '
';<nl><nl>            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(rewardContainerName)) {<nl>                output += $'Items placed in: {rewardContainerName}
';<nl>            }<nl><nl>            lcdLog?.SetText(output);<nl>            RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(questContainer, requiredItems);<nl>        } else {<nl>            output += '<color=#fdb100>You are missing required items. Try again!</color>
';<nl>            lcdLog?.SetText(output);<nl>        }<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>        var lcdLog = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<ILcd>(lcdLogName);<nl>        lcdLog?.SetText($'<color=#ff0000>Error:</color> {ex.Message} (maybe the Quest Container name is wrong)');<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl><nl>string RewardPlayer(string rewardItem, int rewardAmount, int? rewardMeta, IContainer rewardContainer, bool rewardInContainer) {<nl>    try {<nl>        string resultText = '';<nl><nl>        if (rewardInContainer && rewardContainer != null) {<nl>            int itemId = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping()[rewardItem];<nl>            rewardContainer.AddItems(itemId, rewardAmount);  // Only using 2 arguments for AddItems<nl>            resultText = $'{ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(Loc(rewardItem))} x{rewardAmount} (in container)';<nl>        } else {<nl>            if (rewardMeta.HasValue) {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount, rewardMeta.Value);  // Pass 3 arguments: itemName, amount, and meta<nl>                resultText = $'{ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(Loc(rewardItem))} x{rewardAmount}';<nl>            } else {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount);  // Only 2 arguments<nl>                resultText = $'{ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(Loc(rewardItem))} x{rewardAmount}';<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        return resultText;<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Reward error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>        return $'<color=#ff0000>Reward failed: {ex.Message}</color>';<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>void RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(IContainer questContainer, List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems) {<nl>    var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>    var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>    foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>    var amountsToRemove = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>    foreach (var item in requiredItems) amountsToRemove[item.itemName] = item.amount;<nl><nl>    foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>        if (item.count <= 0) continue;<nl><nl>        if (reverseItemMap.TryGetValue(item.id, out string name) && amountsToRemove.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>            int toRemove = Math.Min(item.count, amountsToRemove[name]);<nl>            questContainer.RemoveItems(item.id, toRemove);<nl>            amountsToRemove[name] -= toRemove;<nl>            if (amountsToRemove[name] <= 0) amountsToRemove.Remove(name);<nl><nl>            if (amountsToRemove.Count == 0) break;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}<nl>"

"<nl>void HandleQuestItemDrop(<nl>    string questContainerName,<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var questContainer = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(questContainerName);<nl><nl>        // Count current items in quest container<nl>        var itemCounts = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) itemCounts[req.itemName] = 0;<nl><nl>        foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>            if (item.count > 0 && reverseItemMap.ContainsKey(item.id)) {<nl>                string name = reverseItemMap[item.id];<nl>                if (itemCounts.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>                    itemCounts[name] += item.count;<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        bool allMet = true;<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) {<nl>            int has = itemCounts.ContainsKey(req.itemName) ? itemCounts[req.itemName] : 0;<nl>            if (has < req.amount) allMet = false;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        if (allMet) {<nl>            RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(questContainer, requiredItems);<nl>            Eden_Complete = 1;<nl>        } else {<nl>            Eden_Complete = 0;<nl>        }<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>void RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(IContainer questContainer, List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems) {<nl>    var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>    var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>    foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>    var amountsToRemove = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>    foreach (var item in requiredItems) amountsToRemove[item.itemName] = item.amount;<nl><nl>    foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>        if (item.count <= 0) continue;<nl><nl>        if (reverseItemMap.TryGetValue(item.id, out string name) && amountsToRemove.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>            int toRemove = Math.Min(item.count, amountsToRemove[name]);<nl>            questContainer.RemoveItems(item.id, toRemove);<nl>            amountsToRemove[name] -= toRemove;<nl>            if (amountsToRemove[name] <= 0) amountsToRemove.Remove(name);<nl><nl>            if (amountsToRemove.Count == 0) break;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}<nl>"

';<nl>            lcdLog?.SetText(output);<nl>        }<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>        var lcdLog = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<ILcd>(lcdLogName);<nl>        lcdLog?.SetText($'<color=#ff0000>Error:</color> {ex.Message} (maybe the Quest Container name is wrong)');<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl><nl>string RewardPlayer(string rewardItem, int rewardAmount, int? rewardMeta, IContainer rewardContainer, bool rewardInContainer) {<nl>    try {<nl>        string resultText = '';<nl><nl>        if (rewardInContainer && rewardContainer != null) {<nl>            int itemId = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping()[rewardItem];<nl>            rewardContainer.AddItems(itemId, rewardAmount);  // Only using 2 arguments for AddItems<nl>            resultText = $'{ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(Loc(rewardItem))} x{rewardAmount} (in container)';<nl>        } else {<nl>            if (rewardMeta.HasValue) {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount, rewardMeta.Value);  // Pass 3 arguments: itemName, amount, and meta<nl>                resultText = $'{ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(Loc(rewardItem))} x{rewardAmount}';<nl>            } else {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount);  // Only 2 arguments<nl>                resultText = $'{ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(Loc(rewardItem))} x{rewardAmount}';<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        return resultText;<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Reward error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>        return $'<color=#ff0000>Reward failed: {ex.Message}</color>';<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>void RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(IContainer questContainer, List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems) {<nl>    var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>    var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>    foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>    var amountsToRemove = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>    foreach (var item in requiredItems) amountsToRemove[item.itemName] = item.amount;<nl><nl>    foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>        if (item.count <= 0) continue;<nl><nl>        if (reverseItemMap.TryGetValue(item.id, out string name) && amountsToRemove.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>            int toRemove = Math.Min(item.count, amountsToRemove[name]);<nl>            questContainer.RemoveItems(item.id, toRemove);<nl>            amountsToRemove[name] -= toRemove;<nl>            if (amountsToRemove[name] <= 0) amountsToRemove.Remove(name);<nl><nl>            if (amountsToRemove.Count == 0) break;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}<nl>"

Properties.Functions: "// Helper method to convert bb code to nice lcd colors<nl>string ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(string input) {<nl>    string result = input;<nl><nl>    // First, handle [color]Text[-] and [color]Text<nl>    while (result.Contains('')) {<nl>        int startIndex = result.IndexOf('') + 3;<nl>        int endIndex = result.Contains('') ? result.IndexOf('', startIndex) : result.Length;<nl><nl>        if (startIndex == -1 || endIndex == -1) break;<nl><nl>        string bbCodeContent = result.Substring(startIndex, endIndex - startIndex);<nl><nl>        int colorStart = bbCodeContent.IndexOf('[') + 1;<nl>        int colorEnd = bbCodeContent.IndexOf(']', colorStart);<nl><nl>        if (colorStart == -1 || colorEnd == -1) break;<nl><nl>        string colorCode = bbCodeContent.Substring(colorStart, colorEnd - colorStart);<nl>        string textContent = bbCodeContent.Substring(colorEnd + 1);<nl><nl>        if (textContent.Contains('[-]')) {<nl>            textContent = textContent.Replace('[-]', '');<nl>        }<nl><nl>        string htmlContent = $'<color=#{colorCode}>{textContent}</color>';<nl><nl>        result = result.Replace('' + bbCodeContent + (endIndex < result.Length ? '' : ''), htmlContent);<nl>    }<nl><nl>    // Now, handle ultra-short [color]Text<nl>    // Look for patterns like [ff0000]My Text or [ff0000a0]My Text<nl>    int searchIndex = 0;<nl>    while (searchIndex < result.Length) {<nl>        int colorOpen = result.IndexOf('[', searchIndex);<nl>        if (colorOpen == -1) break;<nl><nl>        int colorClose = result.IndexOf(']', colorOpen);<nl>        if (colorClose == -1 || colorClose - colorOpen < 7) {<nl>            // The color code should have at least 7 characters (e.g., [ff0000] or [ff0000a0])<nl>            searchIndex = colorOpen + 1;<nl>            continue;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        string colorCode = result.Substring(colorOpen + 1, 6);<nl>        string alphaCode = colorClose - colorOpen == 9 ? result.Substring(colorOpen + 7, 2) : 'ff'; // Default alpha to full (ff) if not provided<nl><nl>        // After color code, text starts<nl>        int textStart = colorClose + 1;<nl>        if (textStart >= result.Length) break;<nl><nl>        // Find where the color ends (next BBCode or end of string)<nl>        int nextTag = result.IndexOf('[', textStart);<nl>        int textEnd = nextTag != -1 ? nextTag : result.Length;<nl><nl>        string textContent = result.Substring(textStart, textEnd - textStart);<nl><nl>        string originalBBCode = result.Substring(colorOpen, textEnd - colorOpen);<nl>        string htmlContent = $'<color=#{colorCode}{alphaCode}>{textContent}</color>';<nl><nl>        result = result.Replace(originalBBCode, htmlContent);<nl><nl>        // Move forward<nl>        searchIndex = colorOpen + htmlContent.Length;<nl>    }<nl><nl>    return result;<nl>}<nl><nl>void HandleQuestItemDrop(<nl>    string questContainerName,<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems,<nl>    string lcdLogName,<nl>    bool rewardInContainer = false,<nl>    string rewardContainerName = null<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var lcdLog = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<ILcd>(lcdLogName);<nl>        var questContainer = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(questContainerName);<nl>        var rewardContainer = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(rewardContainerName) ? LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(rewardContainerName) : null;<nl><nl>        // Count current items in quest container<nl>        var itemCounts = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) itemCounts[req.itemName] = 0;<nl><nl>        foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>            if (item.count > 0 && reverseItemMap.ContainsKey(item.id)) {<nl>                string name = reverseItemMap[item.id];<nl>                if (itemCounts.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>                    itemCounts[name] += item.count;<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        string output = 'Quest Requirements:\n';<nl>        bool allMet = true;<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) {<nl>            int has = itemCounts.ContainsKey(req.itemName) ? itemCounts[req.itemName] : 0;<nl>            output += $'{req.itemName}: {has} / {req.amount}\n';<nl>            if (has < req.amount) allMet = false;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        if (allMet) {<nl>            RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(questContainer, requiredItems);<nl>            Eden_Complete = 1;<nl>        } else {<nl>            Eden_Complete = 0;<nl>        }<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>        var lcdLog = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<ILcd>(lcdLogName);<nl>        lcdLog?.SetText($'<color=#ff0000>Error:</color> {ex.Message} (maybe the Quest Container name is wrong)');<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>void RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(IContainer questContainer, List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems) {<nl>    var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>    var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>    foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>    var amountsToRemove = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>    foreach (var item in requiredItems) amountsToRemove[item.itemName] = item.amount;<nl><nl>    foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>        if (item.count <= 0) continue;<nl><nl>        if (reverseItemMap.TryGetValue(item.id, out string name) && amountsToRemove.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>            int toRemove = Math.Min(item.count, amountsToRemove[name]);<nl>            questContainer.RemoveItems(item.id, toRemove);<nl>            amountsToRemove[name] -= toRemove;<nl>            if (amountsToRemove[name] <= 0) amountsToRemove.Remove(name);<nl><nl>            if (amountsToRemove.Count == 0) break;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}<nl>"

Properties.Functions: "private bool CanWarpSimple(int forwardDistance, int closestApproach = 2000)<nl>{<nl>    // Get playfield<nl>    var playfield = ModManager.ModApi.ClientPlayfield;<nl>    if (playfield.PlayfieldType != 'Space')<nl>        return false;<nl><nl>    // Target position<nl>    var player = Application.LocalPlayer;<nl>    var shipEntity = player.DrivingEntity;<nl><nl>    // Sanity checks<nl>    if (!player.IsPilot || shipEntity == null || (shipEntity.Type != EntityType.SV && shipEntity.Type != EntityType.CV))<nl>        return false;<nl><nl>    // Check for obstructions within closestApproach of targetPosition<nl>    var targetPosition = player.Position + player.Forward * forwardDistance;<nl>    foreach (var kvp in playfield.Entities)<nl>    {<nl>        var entity = kvp.Value;<nl><nl>        // Check distance from target point<nl>        var distance = Vector3.Distance(targetPosition, entity.Position);<nl>        if (closestApproach > distance)<nl>        {<nl>            Debug.Log($'Can\'t warp. {entity.Name} ({entity.Id}) is {distance:f0}m from target position');<nl>            return false;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl><nl>    return true;<nl>}<nl><nl>private bool JumpPlayer(int forwardDistance)<nl>{<nl>    var player = Application.LocalPlayer;<nl>    var pos = player.Position + player.Forward * forwardDistance;<nl><nl>    return player.Teleport(pos);<nl>}"

Properties.Functions: "private bool CanJump(int forwardDistance, int closestApproach = 2000)<nl>        {<nl>            // Get playfield<nl>            var playfield = ModManager.ModApi.ClientPlayfield;<nl>            if (playfield.PlayfieldType != 'Space')<nl>                return false;<nl><nl>            // Load data for santiy checks<nl>            var player = Application.LocalPlayer;<nl>           <nl>            var shipEntity = player.DrivingEntity;<nl>            if (shipEntity == null)<nl>                return false;<nl><nl>            var shipStructure = shipEntity.Structure;<nl>            if (shipStructure == null)<nl>                return false;<nl>            <nl>            // Sanity checks<nl>            if (!player.IsPilot || !shipStructure.IsPowered<nl>                || (shipEntity.Type != EntityType.SV && shipEntity.Type != EntityType.CV))<nl>                return false;<nl><nl>            // Check for obstructions within closestApproach of targetPosition<nl>            var targetPosition = player.Position + player.Forward * forwardDistance;<nl>            foreach (var kvp in playfield.Entities)<nl>            {<nl>                var entity = kvp.Value;<nl><nl>                // Check distance from target point<nl>                var distance = Vector3.Distance(targetPosition, entity.Position);<nl>                if (closestApproach > distance)<nl>                {<nl>                    Debug.Log($'Can\'t warp. {entity.Name} ({entity.Id}) is {distance:f0}m from target position');<nl>                    return false;<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl><nl>            return true;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        private bool JumpPlayer(int forwardDistance)<nl>        {<nl>            var player = Application.LocalPlayer;<nl>            var pos = player.Position + player.Forward * forwardDistance;<nl><nl>            return player.Teleport(pos);<nl>        }"

Properties.Functions: "private Vector3 CalculateAndSaveTarget(int distance)<nl>{<nl>    var player = Application.LocalPlayer;<nl>    var target = player.Position + player.Forward * distance;<nl><nl>    TargetX = target.x;<nl>    TargetY = target.y;<nl>    TargetZ = target.z;<nl><nl>    return target;<nl>}<nl><nl>private bool ValidateTarget(Vector3 target, int closestApproach)<nl>{<nl>    // Only allow in space<nl>    var playfield = ModManager.ModApi.ClientPlayfield;<nl>    if (playfield.PlayfieldType != 'Space')<nl>    {<nl>        ErrorMessage = 'Micro jump is only allowed in space';<nl>        return false;<nl>    }<nl><nl>    // Only allow from SV & CV<nl>    var player = Application.LocalPlayer;<nl>    var shipEntity = player.DrivingEntity;<nl>    if (!player.IsPilot || shipEntity == null || (shipEntity.Type != EntityType.SV && shipEntity.Type != EntityType.CV))<nl>    {<nl>        ErrorMessage = 'Micro jump is only allowed on SVs and CVs.';<nl>        return false;<nl>    }<nl><nl>    // Only allow powered on ships<nl>    var structure = shipEntity.Structure;<nl>    if (structure == null || !structure.IsPowered)<nl>    {<nl>        ErrorMessage = 'Micro jump drive requires a powered ship!';<nl>        return false;<nl>    }<nl><nl>    // Check for obstructions<nl>    foreach (var kvp in playfield.Entities)<nl>    {<nl>        var entity = kvp.Value;<nl><nl>        // Check distance from target point<nl>        var distance = Vector3.Distance(target, entity.Position);<nl>        if (closestApproach > distance)<nl>        {<nl>            Debug.Log($'Can\'t jump. {entity.Name} ({entity.Id}) is {distance:f0}m from target position');<nl>            ErrorMessage = $'Micro jump target isn\'t allowed within {closestApproach:n0}m of existing structures or entities';<nl>            return false;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl><nl>    return true;<nl>}"

Properties.Functions: "private Vector3 CalculateAndSaveTarget(int distance)<nl>{<nl>    var player = Application.LocalPlayer;<nl><nl>    // Use the ship's forward direction to calculate the jump target.<nl>    // If player is not in a ship, the jump will fail validation in the next step.<nl>    var target = player.Position + <nl>                 (player.DrivingEntity != null ? player.DrivingEntity.Forward : Vector3.zero) * distance;<nl><nl>    TargetX = target.x;<nl>    TargetY = target.y;<nl>    TargetZ = target.z;<nl><nl>    return target;<nl>}<nl><nl>private bool ValidateTarget(Vector3 target, int closestApproach)<nl>{<nl>    // Only allow in space<nl>    var playfield = ModManager.ModApi.ClientPlayfield;<nl>    if (playfield.PlayfieldType != 'Space')<nl>    {<nl>        ErrorMessage = 'Micro jump is only allowed in space';<nl>        return false;<nl>    }<nl><nl>    // Only allow from SV & CV<nl>    var player = Application.LocalPlayer;<nl>    var shipEntity = player.DrivingEntity;<nl>    if (!player.IsPilot || shipEntity == null || (shipEntity.Type != EntityType.SV && shipEntity.Type != EntityType.CV))<nl>    {<nl>        ErrorMessage = 'Micro jump is only allowed on SVs and CVs.';<nl>        return false;<nl>    }<nl><nl>    // Only allow powered on ships<nl>    var structure = shipEntity.Structure;<nl>    if (structure == null || !structure.IsPowered)<nl>    {<nl>        ErrorMessage = 'Micro jump drive requires a powered ship!';<nl>        return false;<nl>    }<nl><nl>    // Check for obstructions<nl>    foreach (var kvp in playfield.Entities)<nl>    {<nl>        var entity = kvp.Value;<nl><nl>        // Check distance from target point<nl>        var distance = Vector3.Distance(target, entity.Position);<nl>        if (closestApproach > distance)<nl>        {<nl>            Debug.Log($'Can\'t jump. {entity.Name} ({entity.Id}) is {distance:f0}m from target position');<nl>            ErrorMessage = $'Micro jump target isn\'t allowed within {closestApproach:n0}m of existing structures or entities';<nl>            Obstructed = 1;<nl>            return false;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl><nl>    return true;<nl>}"

Properties.Functions: "void HandleQuestItemDrop(<nl>    string questContainerName,<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var questContainer = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(questContainerName);<nl><nl>        // Count current items in quest container<nl>        var itemCounts = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) itemCounts[req.itemName] = 0;<nl><nl>        foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>            if (item.count > 0 && reverseItemMap.ContainsKey(item.id)) {<nl>                string name = reverseItemMap[item.id];<nl>                if (itemCounts.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>                    itemCounts[name] += item.count;<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        bool allMet = true;<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) {<nl>            int has = itemCounts.ContainsKey(req.itemName) ? itemCounts[req.itemName] : 0;<nl>            if (has < req.amount) allMet = false;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        if (allMet) {<nl>            RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(questContainer, requiredItems);<nl>            CargoComplete = 1;<nl>        } else {<nl>            CargoComplete = 0;<nl>        }<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>void RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(IContainer questContainer, List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems) {<nl>    var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>    var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>    foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>    var amountsToRemove = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>    foreach (var item in requiredItems) amountsToRemove[item.itemName] = item.amount;<nl><nl>    foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>        if (item.count <= 0) continue;<nl><nl>        if (reverseItemMap.TryGetValue(item.id, out string name) && amountsToRemove.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>            int toRemove = Math.Min(item.count, amountsToRemove[name]);<nl>            questContainer.RemoveItems(item.id, toRemove);<nl>            amountsToRemove[name] -= toRemove;<nl>            if (amountsToRemove[name] <= 0) amountsToRemove.Remove(name);<nl><nl>            if (amountsToRemove.Count == 0) break;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}"

Properties.Functions: "// Helper method to create reward items with optional meta<nl>(string itemName, int amount, int? meta) CreateReward(string itemName, int amount, int? meta = null) {<nl>    return (itemName, amount, meta);<nl>}<nl><nl>void HandleQuestItemPickup(<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount, int? meta)> rewards,<nl>    bool rewardInContainer = false,<nl>    string rewardContainerName = null<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var rewardContainer = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(rewardContainerName) ? LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(rewardContainerName) : null;<nl>        var rewardsGiven = new List<string>();<nl>        foreach (var reward in rewards) {<nl>            var rewardInfo = RewardPlayer(reward.itemName, reward.amount, reward.meta, rewardContainer, rewardInContainer);<nl>            rewardsGiven.Add(rewardInfo);<nl>        }<nl><nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error');<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl><nl>string RewardPlayer(string rewardItem, int rewardAmount, int? rewardMeta, IContainer rewardContainer, bool rewardInContainer) {<nl>    try {<nl><nl>        if (rewardInContainer && rewardContainer != null) {<nl>            int itemId = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping()[rewardItem];<nl>            rewardContainer.AddItems(itemId, rewardAmount);  // Only using 2 arguments for AddItems<nl>        } else {<nl>            if (rewardMeta.HasValue) {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount, rewardMeta.Value);  // Pass 3 arguments: itemName, amount, and meta<nl>            } else {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount);  // Only 2 arguments<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Reward error');<nl>    }<nl>return 'Test';<nl>}"

"// Helper method to create reward items with optional meta<nl>(string itemName, int amount) CreateReward(string itemName, int amount) {<nl>    return (itemName, amount);<nl>}<nl><nl>void HandleQuestItemPickup(<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount)> rewards,<nl>    string rewardContainerName = null<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var rewardContainer = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(rewardContainerName) ? LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(rewardContainerName) : null;<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Pickup error');<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>string RewardPlayer(string rewardItem, int rewardAmount, IContainer rewardContainer) {<nl>    try {<nl>        int itemId = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping()[rewardItem];<nl>        rewardContainer.AddItems(itemId, rewardAmount);  // Only using 2 arguments for AddItems<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Reward error');<nl>    }<nl>}"

"if (Eden_CargoFaction == 1) CargoFactionName = 'Polaris Megacorp'; if (Eden_CargoFaction == 2) CargoFactionName = 'Free Colonists';<nl>if (Eden_CargoFaction == 3) CargoFactionName = 'Zirax Empire'; if (Eden_CargoFaction == 4) CargoFactionName = 'Pirate Clans';<nl>if (Eden_CargoFaction == 1) CargoType = 'Eden_TradePolarisT2'; if (Eden_CargoFaction == 2) CargoType = 'Eden_TradeColT2';<nl>if (Eden_CargoFaction == 3) CargoType = 'Eden_TradeZiraxT2'; if (Eden_CargoFaction == 4) CargoType = 'Eden_TradePiratesT2';<nl>CargoQuantity = Random(1,2)"

"CargoType = 'Eden_TradePolarisT1';<nl>if (GetReputation(Faction.Polaris) >= Reputation.HonoredMin)<nl>{<nl>    CargoVolume = 600000;<nl>    CargoQuantity = Random(2,3);<nl>    CargoString = 'Polaris Megacorp have requested that you take an extra package if you are able due to your trustworthiness.';<nl>}<nl>else<nl>{<nl>    CargoVolume = 300000;<nl>    CargoQuantity = Random(1,2);<nl>    CargoString = '';<nl>}"

"CargoType = 'Eden_TradeColT1';<nl>if (GetReputation(Faction.Colonists) >= Reputation.HonoredMin)<nl>{<nl>    CargoVolume = 600000;<nl>    CargoQuantity = Random(2,3);<nl>    CargoString = 'A representative of the Free Colonists has requested that you take an extra package if you are able due to your trustworthiness.';<nl>}<nl>else<nl>{<nl>    CargoVolume = 300000;<nl>    CargoQuantity = Random(1,2);<nl>    CargoString = '';<nl>}"

"CargoType = 'Eden_TradeZiraxT1';<nl>if (GetReputation(Faction.Zirax) >= Reputation.HonoredMin)<nl>{<nl>    CargoVolume = 600000;<nl>    CargoQuantity = Random(2,3);<nl>    CargoString = 'An imperial ambassador has personally requested that we give you an extra courier package due to being considered an honored ally.';<nl>}<nl>else<nl>{<nl>    CargoVolume = 300000;<nl>    CargoQuantity = Random(1,2);<nl>    CargoString = '';<nl>}"

"CargoType = 'Eden_TradePiratesT1';<nl>if (GetReputation(Faction.Pirates) >= Reputation.HonoredMin)<nl>{<nl>    CargoVolume = 600000;<nl>    CargoQuantity = Random(2,3);<nl>    CargoString = 'In fact a little birdie told me to offer you an extra unregistered package because you are such a good pirate.';<nl>}<nl>else<nl>{<nl>    CargoVolume = 300000;<nl>    CargoQuantity = Random(1,2);<nl>    CargoString = '';<nl>}"

Properties.Functions: "// Helper method to create reward items with optional meta<nl>(string itemName, int amount, int? meta) CreateReward(string itemName, int amount, int? meta = null) {<nl>    return (itemName, amount, meta);<nl>}<nl><nl>void HandleQuestItemPickup(<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount, int? meta)> rewards,<nl>    bool rewardInContainer = false,<nl>    string rewardContainerName = null<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var rewardContainer = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(rewardContainerName) ? LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(rewardContainerName) : null;<nl>        var rewardsGiven = new List<string>();<nl>        foreach (var reward in rewards) {<nl>            var rewardInfo = RewardPlayer(reward.itemName, reward.amount, reward.meta, rewardContainer, rewardInContainer);<nl>            rewardsGiven.Add(rewardInfo);<nl>        }<nl><nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error');<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl><nl>string RewardPlayer(string rewardItem, int rewardAmount, int? rewardMeta, IContainer rewardContainer, bool rewardInContainer) {<nl>    try {<nl><nl>        if (rewardInContainer && rewardContainer != null) {<nl>            int itemId = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping()[rewardItem];<nl>            rewardContainer.AddItems(itemId, rewardAmount);  // Only using 2 arguments for AddItems<nl>        } else {<nl>            if (rewardMeta.HasValue) {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount, rewardMeta.Value);  // Pass 3 arguments: itemName, amount, and meta<nl>            } else {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount);  // Only 2 arguments<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Reward error');<nl>    }<nl>return 'Test';<nl>}"

LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(rewardContainerName) : null;<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Pickup error');<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>string RewardPlayer(string rewardItem, int rewardAmount, IContainer rewardContainer) {<nl>    try {<nl>        int itemId = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping()[rewardItem];<nl>        rewardContainer.AddItems(itemId, rewardAmount);  // Only using 2 arguments for AddItems<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Reward error');<nl>    }<nl>}"

Properties.Functions:
"// Helper method to convert bb code to nice lcd colors<nl>string ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(string input) {<nl>    string result = input;<nl><nl>    // First, handle [color]Text[-] and [color]Text<nl>    while (result.Contains('')) {<nl>        int startIndex = result.IndexOf('') + 3;<nl>        int endIndex = result.Contains('') ? result.IndexOf('', startIndex) : result.Length;<nl><nl>        if (startIndex == -1 || endIndex == -1) break;<nl><nl>        string bbCodeContent = result.Substring(startIndex, endIndex - startIndex);<nl><nl>        int colorStart = bbCodeContent.IndexOf('[') + 1;<nl>        int colorEnd = bbCodeContent.IndexOf(']', colorStart);<nl><nl>        if (colorStart == -1 || colorEnd == -1) break;<nl><nl>        string colorCode = bbCodeContent.Substring(colorStart, colorEnd - colorStart);<nl>        string textContent = bbCodeContent.Substring(colorEnd + 1);<nl><nl>        if (textContent.Contains('[-]')) {<nl>            textContent = textContent.Replace('[-]', '');<nl>        }<nl><nl>        string htmlContent = $'<color=#{colorCode}>{textContent}</color>';<nl><nl>        result = result.Replace('' + bbCodeContent + (endIndex < result.Length ? '' : ''), htmlContent);<nl>    }<nl><nl>    // Now, handle ultra-short [color]Text<nl>    // Look for patterns like [ff0000]My Text or [ff0000a0]My Text<nl>    int searchIndex = 0;<nl>    while (searchIndex < result.Length) {<nl>        int colorOpen = result.IndexOf('[', searchIndex);<nl>        if (colorOpen == -1) break;<nl><nl>        int colorClose = result.IndexOf(']', colorOpen);<nl>        if (colorClose == -1 || colorClose - colorOpen < 7) {<nl>            // The color code should have at least 7 characters (e.g., [ff0000] or [ff0000a0])<nl>            searchIndex = colorOpen + 1;<nl>            continue;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        string colorCode = result.Substring(colorOpen + 1, 6);<nl>        string alphaCode = colorClose - colorOpen == 9 ? result.Substring(colorOpen + 7, 2) : 'ff'; // Default alpha to full (ff) if not provided<nl><nl>        // After color code, text starts<nl>        int textStart = colorClose + 1;<nl>        if (textStart >= result.Length) break;<nl><nl>        // Find where the color ends (next BBCode or end of string)<nl>        int nextTag = result.IndexOf('[', textStart);<nl>        int textEnd = nextTag != -1 ? nextTag : result.Length;<nl><nl>        string textContent = result.Substring(textStart, textEnd - textStart);<nl><nl>        string originalBBCode = result.Substring(colorOpen, textEnd - colorOpen);<nl>        string htmlContent = $'<color=#{colorCode}{alphaCode}>{textContent}</color>';<nl><nl>        result = result.Replace(originalBBCode, htmlContent);<nl><nl>        // Move forward<nl>        searchIndex = colorOpen + htmlContent.Length;<nl>    }<nl><nl>    return result;<nl>}<nl><nl>// Helper method to create reward items with optional meta<nl>(string itemName, int amount, int? meta) CreateReward(string itemName, int amount, int? meta = null) {<nl>    return (itemName, amount, meta);<nl>}<nl><nl>void HandleQuestItemDrop(<nl>    string questContainerName,<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems,<nl>    string lcdLogName,<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount, int? meta)> rewards,<nl>    bool rewardInContainer = false,<nl>    string rewardContainerName = null<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var lcdLog = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<ILcd>(lcdLogName);<nl>        var questContainer = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(questContainerName);<nl>        var rewardContainer = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(rewardContainerName) ? LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(rewardContainerName) : null;<nl><nl>        // Count current items in quest container<nl>        var itemCounts = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) itemCounts[req.itemName] = 0;<nl><nl>        foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>            if (item.count > 0 && reverseItemMap.ContainsKey(item.id)) {<nl>                string name = reverseItemMap[item.id];<nl>                if (itemCounts.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>                    itemCounts[name] += item.count;<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        string output = 'Quest Requirements:
';<nl>        bool allMet = true;<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) {<nl>            int has = itemCounts.ContainsKey(req.itemName) ? itemCounts[req.itemName] : 0;<nl>            output += $'{req.itemName}: {has} / {req.amount}
';<nl>            if (has < req.amount) allMet = false;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        if (allMet) {<nl>            output += '<color=#019245>All items delivered! Quest Completed!</color>
';<nl><nl>            var rewardsGiven = new List<string>();<nl>            foreach (var reward in rewards) {<nl>                if (reward.meta.HasValue && rewardInContainer) {<nl>                    output += '<color=#ff0000>Meta items cannot be placed in containers!</color>
';<nl>                } else {<nl>                    var rewardInfo = RewardPlayer(reward.itemName, reward.amount, reward.meta, rewardContainer, rewardInContainer);<nl>                    rewardsGiven.Add(rewardInfo);<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl><nl>            output += 'Rewards:
';<nl>            foreach (var r in rewardsGiven) output += '- ' + r + '
';<nl><nl>            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(rewardContainerName)) {<nl>                output += $'Items placed in: {rewardContainerName}
';<nl>            }<nl><nl>            lcdLog?.SetText(output);<nl>            RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(questContainer, requiredItems);<nl>        } else {<nl>            output += '<color=#fdb100>You are missing required items. Try again!</color>
';<nl>            lcdLog?.SetText(output);<nl>        }<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>        var lcdLog = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<ILcd>(lcdLogName);<nl>        lcdLog?.SetText($'<color=#ff0000>Error:</color> {ex.Message} (maybe the Quest Container name is wrong)');<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl><nl>string RewardPlayer(string rewardItem, int rewardAmount, int? rewardMeta, IContainer rewardContainer, bool rewardInContainer) {<nl>    try {<nl>        string resultText = '';<nl><nl>        if (rewardInContainer && rewardContainer != null) {<nl>            int itemId = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping()[rewardItem];<nl>            rewardContainer.AddItems(itemId, rewardAmount);  // Only using 2 arguments for AddItems<nl>            resultText = $'{ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(Loc(rewardItem))} x{rewardAmount} (in container)';<nl>        } else {<nl>            if (rewardMeta.HasValue) {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount, rewardMeta.Value);  // Pass 3 arguments: itemName, amount, and meta<nl>                resultText = $'{ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(Loc(rewardItem))} x{rewardAmount}';<nl>            } else {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount);  // Only 2 arguments<nl>                resultText = $'{ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(Loc(rewardItem))} x{rewardAmount}';<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        return resultText;<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Reward error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>        return $'<color=#ff0000>Reward failed: {ex.Message}</color>';<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>void RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(IContainer questContainer, List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems) {<nl>    var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>    var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>    foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>    var amountsToRemove = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>    foreach (var item in requiredItems) amountsToRemove[item.itemName] = item.amount;<nl><nl>    foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>        if (item.count <= 0) continue;<nl><nl>        if (reverseItemMap.TryGetValue(item.id, out string name) && amountsToRemove.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>            int toRemove = Math.Min(item.count, amountsToRemove[name]);<nl>            questContainer.RemoveItems(item.id, toRemove);<nl>            amountsToRemove[name] -= toRemove;<nl>            if (amountsToRemove[name] <= 0) amountsToRemove.Remove(name);<nl><nl>            if (amountsToRemove.Count == 0) break;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}"
Properties.Execute: "var requiredItems = new List<(string, int)> {<nl>    ('IronOre', 1),<nl>};<nl>var rewards = new List<(string, int, int?)> {<nl>    CreateReward('ZascosiumIngot', 5000),<nl>};<nl>HandleQuestItemDrop('CargoDrop', requiredItems, 'LCDLOG', rewards, rewardInContainer: true, 'CargoDrop');"

"// Helper method to convert bb code to nice lcd colors<nl>string ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(string input) {<nl>    string result = input;<nl><nl>    // First, handle [color]Text[-] and [color]Text<nl>    while (result.Contains('')) {<nl>        int startIndex = result.IndexOf('') + 3;<nl>        int endIndex = result.Contains('') ? result.IndexOf('', startIndex) : result.Length;<nl><nl>        if (startIndex == -1 || endIndex == -1) break;<nl><nl>        string bbCodeContent = result.Substring(startIndex, endIndex - startIndex);<nl><nl>        int colorStart = bbCodeContent.IndexOf('[') + 1;<nl>        int colorEnd = bbCodeContent.IndexOf(']', colorStart);<nl><nl>        if (colorStart == -1 || colorEnd == -1) break;<nl><nl>        string colorCode = bbCodeContent.Substring(colorStart, colorEnd - colorStart);<nl>        string textContent = bbCodeContent.Substring(colorEnd + 1);<nl><nl>        if (textContent.Contains('[-]')) {<nl>            textContent = textContent.Replace('[-]', '');<nl>        }<nl><nl>        string htmlContent = $'<color=#{colorCode}>{textContent}</color>';<nl><nl>        result = result.Replace('' + bbCodeContent + (endIndex < result.Length ? '' : ''), htmlContent);<nl>    }<nl><nl>    // Now, handle ultra-short [color]Text<nl>    // Look for patterns like [ff0000]My Text or [ff0000a0]My Text<nl>    int searchIndex = 0;<nl>    while (searchIndex < result.Length) {<nl>        int colorOpen = result.IndexOf('[', searchIndex);<nl>        if (colorOpen == -1) break;<nl><nl>        int colorClose = result.IndexOf(']', colorOpen);<nl>        if (colorClose == -1 || colorClose - colorOpen < 7) {<nl>            // The color code should have at least 7 characters (e.g., [ff0000] or [ff0000a0])<nl>            searchIndex = colorOpen + 1;<nl>            continue;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        string colorCode = result.Substring(colorOpen + 1, 6);<nl>        string alphaCode = colorClose - colorOpen == 9 ? result.Substring(colorOpen + 7, 2) : 'ff'; // Default alpha to full (ff) if not provided<nl><nl>        // After color code, text starts<nl>        int textStart = colorClose + 1;<nl>        if (textStart >= result.Length) break;<nl><nl>        // Find where the color ends (next BBCode or end of string)<nl>        int nextTag = result.IndexOf('[', textStart);<nl>        int textEnd = nextTag != -1 ? nextTag : result.Length;<nl><nl>        string textContent = result.Substring(textStart, textEnd - textStart);<nl><nl>        string originalBBCode = result.Substring(colorOpen, textEnd - colorOpen);<nl>        string htmlContent = $'<color=#{colorCode}{alphaCode}>{textContent}</color>';<nl><nl>        result = result.Replace(originalBBCode, htmlContent);<nl><nl>        // Move forward<nl>        searchIndex = colorOpen + htmlContent.Length;<nl>    }<nl><nl>    return result;<nl>}<nl><nl>// Helper method to create reward items with optional meta<nl>(string itemName, int amount, int? meta) CreateReward(string itemName, int amount, int? meta = null) {<nl>    return (itemName, amount, meta);<nl>}<nl><nl>void HandleQuestItemDrop(<nl>    string questContainerName,<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems,<nl>    string lcdLogName,<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount, int? meta)> rewards,<nl>    bool rewardInContainer = false,<nl>    string rewardContainerName = null<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var lcdLog = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<ILcd>(lcdLogName);<nl>        var questContainer = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(questContainerName);<nl>        var rewardContainer = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(rewardContainerName) ? LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(rewardContainerName) : null;<nl><nl>        // Count current items in quest container<nl>        var itemCounts = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) itemCounts[req.itemName] = 0;<nl><nl>        foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>            if (item.count > 0 && reverseItemMap.ContainsKey(item.id)) {<nl>                string name = reverseItemMap[item.id];<nl>                if (itemCounts.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>                    itemCounts[name] += item.count;<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        string output = 'Quest Requirements:
';<nl>        bool allMet = true;<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) {<nl>            int has = itemCounts.ContainsKey(req.itemName) ? itemCounts[req.itemName] : 0;<nl>            output += $'{req.itemName}: {has} / {req.amount}
';<nl>            if (has < req.amount) allMet = false;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        if (allMet) {<nl>            output += '<color=#019245>All items delivered! Quest Completed!</color>
';<nl><nl>            var rewardsGiven = new List<string>();<nl>            foreach (var reward in rewards) {<nl>                if (reward.meta.HasValue && rewardInContainer) {<nl>                    output += '<color=#ff0000>Meta items cannot be placed in containers!</color>
';<nl>                } else {<nl>                    var rewardInfo = RewardPlayer(reward.itemName, reward.amount, reward.meta, rewardContainer, rewardInContainer);<nl>                    rewardsGiven.Add(rewardInfo);<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl><nl>            output += 'Rewards:
';<nl>            foreach (var r in rewardsGiven) output += '- ' + r + '
';<nl><nl>            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(rewardContainerName)) {<nl>                output += $'Items placed in: {rewardContainerName}
';<nl>            }<nl><nl>            lcdLog?.SetText(output);<nl>            RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(questContainer, requiredItems);<nl>        } else {<nl>            output += '<color=#fdb100>You are missing required items. Try again!</color>
';<nl>            lcdLog?.SetText(output);<nl><nl><nl>            var rewardsGiven = new List<string>();<nl>            foreach (var reward in rewards) {<nl>                var rewardInfo = RewardPlayer(reward.itemName, reward.amount, reward.meta, rewardContainer, rewardInContainer);<nl>                rewardsGiven.Add(rewardInfo);<nl>            }<nl><nl><nl>        }<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>        var lcdLog = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<ILcd>(lcdLogName);<nl>        lcdLog?.SetText($'<color=#ff0000>Error:</color> {ex.Message} (maybe the Quest Container name is wrong)');<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl><nl>string RewardPlayer(string rewardItem, int rewardAmount, int? rewardMeta, IContainer rewardContainer, bool rewardInContainer) {<nl>    try {<nl>        string resultText = '';<nl><nl>        if (rewardInContainer && rewardContainer != null) {<nl>            int itemId = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping()[rewardItem];<nl>            rewardContainer.AddItems(itemId, rewardAmount);  // Only using 2 arguments for AddItems<nl>            resultText = $'{ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(Loc(rewardItem))} x{rewardAmount} (in container)';<nl>        } else {<nl>            if (rewardMeta.HasValue) {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount, rewardMeta.Value);  // Pass 3 arguments: itemName, amount, and meta<nl>                resultText = $'{ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(Loc(rewardItem))} x{rewardAmount}';<nl>            } else {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount);  // Only 2 arguments<nl>                resultText = $'{ConvertBBCodeToHtmlColor(Loc(rewardItem))} x{rewardAmount}';<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        return resultText;<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Reward error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>        return $'<color=#ff0000>Reward failed: {ex.Message}</color>';<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>void RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(IContainer questContainer, List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems) {<nl>    var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>    var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>    foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>    var amountsToRemove = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>    foreach (var item in requiredItems) amountsToRemove[item.itemName] = item.amount;<nl><nl>    foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>        if (item.count <= 0) continue;<nl><nl>        if (reverseItemMap.TryGetValue(item.id, out string name) && amountsToRemove.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>            int toRemove = Math.Min(item.count, amountsToRemove[name]);<nl>            questContainer.RemoveItems(item.id, toRemove);<nl>            amountsToRemove[name] -= toRemove;<nl>            if (amountsToRemove[name] <= 0) amountsToRemove.Remove(name);<nl><nl>            if (amountsToRemove.Count == 0) break;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}"

Properties.Functions: "void HandleQuestItemDrop(<nl>    string questContainerName,<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var questContainer = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(questContainerName);<nl><nl>        // Count current items in quest container<nl>        var itemCounts = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) itemCounts[req.itemName] = 0;<nl><nl>        foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>            if (item.count > 0 && reverseItemMap.ContainsKey(item.id)) {<nl>                string name = reverseItemMap[item.id];<nl>                if (itemCounts.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>                    itemCounts[name] += item.count;<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        bool allMet = true;<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) {<nl>            int has = itemCounts.ContainsKey(req.itemName) ? itemCounts[req.itemName] : 0;<nl>            if (has < req.amount) allMet = false;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        if (allMet) {<nl>            RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(questContainer, requiredItems);<nl>            CargoComplete = 1;<nl>        } else {<nl>            CargoComplete = 0;<nl>        }<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>void RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(IContainer questContainer, List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems) {<nl>    var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>    var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>    foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>    var amountsToRemove = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>    foreach (var item in requiredItems) amountsToRemove[item.itemName] = item.amount;<nl><nl>    foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>        if (item.count <= 0) continue;<nl><nl>        if (reverseItemMap.TryGetValue(item.id, out string name) && amountsToRemove.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>            int toRemove = Math.Min(item.count, amountsToRemove[name]);<nl>            questContainer.RemoveItems(item.id, toRemove);<nl>            amountsToRemove[name] -= toRemove;<nl>            if (amountsToRemove[name] <= 0) amountsToRemove.Remove(name);<nl><nl>            if (amountsToRemove.Count == 0) break;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}"

itemCounts[req.itemName] : 0;<nl>            if (has < req.amount) allMet = false;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        if (allMet) {<nl>            RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(questContainer, requiredItems);<nl>            CargoComplete = 1;<nl>        } else {<nl>            CargoComplete = 0;<nl>        }<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>void RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(IContainer questContainer, List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems) {<nl>    var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>    var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>    foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>    var amountsToRemove = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>    foreach (var item in requiredItems) amountsToRemove[item.itemName] = item.amount;<nl><nl>    foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>        if (item.count <= 0) continue;<nl><nl>        if (reverseItemMap.TryGetValue(item.id, out string name) && amountsToRemove.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>            int toRemove = Math.Min(item.count, amountsToRemove[name]);<nl>            questContainer.RemoveItems(item.id, toRemove);<nl>            amountsToRemove[name] -= toRemove;<nl>            if (amountsToRemove[name] <= 0) amountsToRemove.Remove(name);<nl><nl>            if (amountsToRemove.Count == 0) break;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}"

Properties.Functions: "// Helper method to create reward items with optional meta<nl>(string itemName, int amount, int? meta) CreateReward(string itemName, int amount, int? meta = null) {<nl>    return (itemName, amount, meta);<nl>}<nl><nl>void HandleQuestItemPickup(<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount, int? meta)> rewards,<nl>    bool rewardInContainer = false,<nl>    string rewardContainerName = null<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var rewardContainer = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(rewardContainerName) ? LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(rewardContainerName) : null;<nl>        var rewardsGiven = new List<string>();<nl>        foreach (var reward in rewards) {<nl>            var rewardInfo = RewardPlayer(reward.itemName, reward.amount, reward.meta, rewardContainer, rewardInContainer);<nl>            rewardsGiven.Add(rewardInfo);<nl>        }<nl><nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error');<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl><nl>string RewardPlayer(string rewardItem, int rewardAmount, int? rewardMeta, IContainer rewardContainer, bool rewardInContainer) {<nl>    try {<nl><nl>        if (rewardInContainer && rewardContainer != null) {<nl>            int itemId = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping()[rewardItem];<nl>            rewardContainer.AddItems(itemId, rewardAmount);  // Only using 2 arguments for AddItems<nl>        } else {<nl>            if (rewardMeta.HasValue) {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount, rewardMeta.Value);  // Pass 3 arguments: itemName, amount, and meta<nl>            } else {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount);  // Only 2 arguments<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Reward error');<nl>    }<nl>return 'Test';<nl>}"

"void HandleQuestItemDrop(<nl>    string questContainerName,<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var questContainer = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(questContainerName);<nl><nl>        // Count current items in quest container<nl>        var itemCounts = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) itemCounts[req.itemName] = 0;<nl><nl>        foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>            if (item.count > 0 && reverseItemMap.ContainsKey(item.id)) {<nl>                string name = reverseItemMap[item.id];<nl>                if (itemCounts.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>                    itemCounts[name] += item.count;<nl>                }<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        bool allMet = true;<nl>        foreach (var req in requiredItems) {<nl>            int has = itemCounts.ContainsKey(req.itemName) ? itemCounts[req.itemName] : 0;<nl>            if (has < req.amount) allMet = false;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        if (allMet) {<nl>            RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(questContainer, requiredItems);<nl>            CargoComplete = 1;<nl>        } else {<nl>            CargoComplete = 0;<nl>        }<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>void RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(IContainer questContainer, List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems) {<nl>    var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>    var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>    foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>    var amountsToRemove = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>    foreach (var item in requiredItems) amountsToRemove[item.itemName] = item.amount;<nl><nl>    foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>        if (item.count <= 0) continue;<nl><nl>        if (reverseItemMap.TryGetValue(item.id, out string name) && amountsToRemove.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>            int toRemove = Math.Min(item.count, amountsToRemove[name]);<nl>            questContainer.RemoveItems(item.id, toRemove);<nl>            amountsToRemove[name] -= toRemove;<nl>            if (amountsToRemove[name] <= 0) amountsToRemove.Remove(name);<nl><nl>            if (amountsToRemove.Count == 0) break;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}"

itemCounts[req.itemName] : 0;<nl>            if (has < req.amount) allMet = false;<nl>        }<nl><nl>        if (allMet) {<nl>            RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(questContainer, requiredItems);<nl>            CargoComplete = 1;<nl>        } else {<nl>            CargoComplete = 0;<nl>        }<nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error: ' + ex.Message);<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>void RemoveQuestItemsFromContainer(IContainer questContainer, List<(string itemName, int amount)> requiredItems) {<nl>    var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>    var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>    foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>    var amountsToRemove = new Dictionary<string, int>();<nl>    foreach (var item in requiredItems) amountsToRemove[item.itemName] = item.amount;<nl><nl>    foreach (var item in questContainer.GetContent()) {<nl>        if (item.count <= 0) continue;<nl><nl>        if (reverseItemMap.TryGetValue(item.id, out string name) && amountsToRemove.ContainsKey(name)) {<nl>            int toRemove = Math.Min(item.count, amountsToRemove[name]);<nl>            questContainer.RemoveItems(item.id, toRemove);<nl>            amountsToRemove[name] -= toRemove;<nl>            if (amountsToRemove[name] <= 0) amountsToRemove.Remove(name);<nl><nl>            if (amountsToRemove.Count == 0) break;<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}"

Properties.Functions: "// Helper method to create reward items with optional meta<nl>(string itemName, int amount, int? meta) CreateReward(string itemName, int amount, int? meta = null) {<nl>    return (itemName, amount, meta);<nl>}<nl><nl>void HandleQuestItemPickup(<nl>    List<(string itemName, int amount, int? meta)> rewards,<nl>    bool rewardInContainer = false,<nl>    string rewardContainerName = null<nl>) {<nl>    try {<nl>        var dicItem = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping();<nl>        var reverseItemMap = new Dictionary<int, string>();<nl>        foreach (var kvp in dicItem) reverseItemMap[kvp.Value] = kvp.Key;<nl><nl>        var rewardContainer = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(rewardContainerName) ? LocalStructure?.GetDevice<IContainer>(rewardContainerName) : null;<nl>        var rewardsGiven = new List<string>();<nl>        foreach (var reward in rewards) {<nl>            var rewardInfo = RewardPlayer(reward.itemName, reward.amount, reward.meta, rewardContainer, rewardInContainer);<nl>            rewardsGiven.Add(rewardInfo);<nl>        }<nl><nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Quest drop error');<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl><nl>string RewardPlayer(string rewardItem, int rewardAmount, int? rewardMeta, IContainer rewardContainer, bool rewardInContainer) {<nl>    try {<nl><nl>        if (rewardInContainer && rewardContainer != null) {<nl>            int itemId = Application.GetBlockAndItemMapping()[rewardItem];<nl>            rewardContainer.AddItems(itemId, rewardAmount);  // Only using 2 arguments for AddItems<nl>        } else {<nl>            if (rewardMeta.HasValue) {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount, rewardMeta.Value);  // Pass 3 arguments: itemName, amount, and meta<nl>            } else {<nl>                AddItem(rewardItem, rewardAmount);  // Only 2 arguments<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>    } catch (Exception ex) {<nl>        Debug.Log('Reward error');<nl>    }<nl>return 'Test';<nl>}"
